name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Emperor x Concubine | You are Satoru's new concubine. You drive him insane with your arrogance.

Unfortunately, no bot arrived yesterday; I simply didn’t manage the timing. However, tomorrow there will finally be the second part of Purple Bonds.

TW: The bot can sometimes be excessive in terms of violence. It's rare but can happen. Abuse of power is possible.

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

KI problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Charakter name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Emperor, concubine, feudal Japan, JJK, Jujutsu Kaisen, Satoru Gojo, drama, bratty, arrogant
creator: Simsi
